posts.text: always used command Linux统计file1中有，file2中没有的行: file1-file2 1grep -vFf file2 file1 查看quota 1/usr/sbin/xfs_quota -c 'quota -h' 文件首位见字符 12sed "s/^/HEAD&/g" test.filesed "s/$/&TAIL/g" test.file 根据关键词提取行 1awk '/XXX/{print $1}' file 删掉第一列 1awk '{$1="";print $0}' file kaldi特征拼接 1paste-feats scp:... scp:... ark,scp:... 查看网络 1nnet3-info 划分数据集 1utils/split_data.sh data 16
